transcript.text:
[Cheongju Episode 2]
[40 Dumplings]
[Where did she go after?]
You can eat a lot, right?
Eat all of this
[That?!]
[Charcoal]
[Pork]
[10 servings]
This is insane
[The greatest]
[Genuine]
Where's all of that going to?!
Amazing
[Where is she going after eating the dumplings?]
[Cheongju Sachang Traditional Market]

Ta-da
I came to the market nearby
I've filmed a program (TV show) here before
There's a Pork Belly restaurant here that was truly amazing
[Aired on 2021.04.01] <Hometown Report - Cheongju Episode>
How is it?
Can you be my mom?
[Full version on 'KBS Life' channel on YouTube]
It was the best
[KkulKkul-e Charcoal KBBQ located in Seowon district, city of Cheongju]
Excuse me~
Hello
Tzuyang!!
Nice to see you
How have you been?
I've been good

Been busy after your visit
This was the best restaurant I've been to with 'Hometown Report'
Really?
Thank you so much
So you have pork belly and pork shoulder blade right now?
I'll take 5 orders each
Alrighty
I'll bring the charcoal first
Should I act surprised?
Should we do it again?
Why would you need to act surprised?
And say "You're ordering that much?!"
Are you ordering that much?!
Can you eat all of that?!
You can be an actress
That's warm

I'll set up the table
Looks delicious
[10 servings of pork] Thank you
I'll grill for you
Thank you
Looks yummy
It was really good when you grilled it
I have the experience
Did you eat before this?
I had some dumplings just now
You can still eat this, right?
Of course
That looks good
I don't mean to brag, but our meat is delicious
Right?
The best

Looks delicious
I'll cut them into big pieces
Thank you
Put more on the grill
Try it
How do you spread the salt like that?
[It's me]
Thank you
Dip it in the sauce
It's that same taste
Good, right?
You're happy, right? From eating delicious food
I love it
Thank you
It's so good Crazy
I'll grill the rest

I'll pace myself
Eat all of our meat today
How can I eat all of this?
You can do it
Pork belly
It's so good Insane
This pork belly comes with the skin
The fat is chewy
The skin is also chewy
I usually like grilling on the frying pan
because otherwise, the juice will all drop down
But this somehow brings the smokiness flavor while keeping it juicy inside
The smoky flavor is amazing
I remember their kimchi being delicious
Yes, delicious
[Burnt]

It's burnt
[Help]
[To the rescue]
It's difficult to charcoal grill
Yes indeed
Ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste) on top
Scallions
Wrap it
[Help me!]
Almost burnt this one too
No, come here
Amazing
Some kimchi
On top
[Scar]
All because of Jingu

[Jingu: I'm sorry]
Thank you, ma'am
So good at eating
This is why you do mukbang
Big people can't even eat that much
You're this small eating that much
In a wrap
3 pieces
Spiced bean sprouts
All of that going into that small belly
After eating 40 dumplings
Just incredible
No more smoke
Eating it right when it's off the grill
[Thumbs up]
It's crazy

You're doing a good job
[You don't need my help]
Thank you
I learned it from the best
You're a quick learner
It looks even more delicious through the screen
This is about right
It's best when it's not too well-done
That's when it's the juiciest
[Explosion sound]
Is this the same shoulder blade that I've been eating?
It's cooked just right
It's very rich in flavor
Crazy crazy crazy
It's cooked just right It's going to be amazing
Another chunk of shoulder blade

Perilla leaf
Put this on top
Roll it
I wish this place was near my house
I wish too
So I can sell you 10 servings every day
It's so good
I've figured out how to grill it right
It was a bit dry at first, but now it's so good
Now you're doing it properly
You're the best
Wrap it
There's not much left
Why am I not getting full?!
I'm completely sold on the smokey flavor
That tasty kind of fat, not the greasy kind

The ones with a bit of a crunch
Amazing
[Grill more]
[Again]
[Keep grilling]
Can I have some more salt, please?
Thank you
You can leave it here
[I can do it too now]
[Shake of approval]
It hasn't even been an hour
People tend to eat slower as time goes by
But you keep that same pace from start to finish
[Because it's that delicious!]
A piece of garlic
It's ready

What?
It's all gone
It's not enough I'm not full yet
That's a bummer
Excuse me
Do you have Ramyun noodles? Of course
Can I have 1, please?
1? Okay
Can you eat noodles after eating all of that?
Yes
I saw that tiny sign on the menu
Written so cute and small
[While she enjoys the rest of her pork belly]
Thank you
Enjoy
Not too cooked Just how I like it

Ramyun is the best after eating pork belly
Amazing
Should I do a Chashu topping?
Top it off with pork belly
Noodles first
And then
Pork belly
You eat it deliciously
I'm craving it too now
Last piece of meat
I don't even need ssamjang
[Finished]
Did you really finish it all?!
How come you don't have a belly?
I do have a belly
Today, I got to eat red chili dumpling soup which I've been wanting to try

And also some pork belly that I've been craving
It was very satisfying
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
